explanation: The user asks to go to the potato that is in a cabinet. From the state, potato_1 is inside a cabinet (cabinet_0). The robot is currently not holding any object. Since the goal is to go to the location of the potato (in the cabinet), the robot should first navigate to the cabinet. The plan is to go to cabinet_0, which contains the potato_1. No pick-up is needed as the instruction is only to go to the potato's location.
